name: Boiled Crawfish -- Justin Wilson
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring seasonings to a boil for 10 minutes.
2. Add potatoes, corn, and smoked sausage. Continue boiling for another 10 minutes.
3. Add the crawfish and return to a boil.
4. Turn off the heat immediately.
5. Let soak for 20 to 30 minutes.
6. Drain and peel the crawfish.
While the water is coming to a boil, carefully cull and clean the crawfish by rinsing them well with a garden hose and removing any dead ones. Always wear gloves when handling crawfish, as they can still pinch you through gloves.
Justin Wilson writes: "Not everybody likes the fat, but I do, and I love to dig my finger into the head and scoop it out. During crawfish season, my finger stays yellow from one end to the other."
